blogs.name: Eraser Decision Node Blog
blogs.description: The official Eraser blog covering technical diagramming, AI-powered documentation, engineering workflows, and product updates.
blogs.notes: No RSS/Atom feed found at standard paths (/feed, /feed.xml, /rss.xml, /decision-node/rss.xml, /blog/rss.xml). Blog is rendered as a standard web page without a discoverable syndication feed.
